title: Miconia capillinervis
taxonomy: Miconia capillinervis is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. The Melastomataceae family is a part of the order Myrtales, which is a large and diverse order of flowering plants. The order Myrtales is part of the clade Rosids, which is a large and diverse clade of flowering plants that also includes the families of roses and figs. The Rosids clade is a part of the larger clade of flowering plants known as the Angiosperms.
